payload.answer: I have conflicting information: Sara is recorded as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify which relationship is correct, or whether these refer to different people named Sara.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to Sara, which appears to match the existing Sara, but it asserts a different family relationship.

details: No durable memory was committed because the input directly conflicts with existing memory.

repair_options: Keep Sara as your daughter and ignore the new niece statement.
Replace the existing relationship with Sara is your niece.
Treat these as two different people named Sara and create a separate Sara entity.
Mark the relationship as uncertain until clarified.
